description_long: A rustic loaf of multigrain bread sits atop a rectangular wooden cutting board. The bread is partially sliced, revealing a dense, airy crumb with visible seeds and grains embedded throughout. Its crust is thick, golden-brown, and uneven, with a scattering of sesame seeds and a rough, rustic texture. The loaf has a slightly domed top and irregular, hand-shaped form, suggesting artisanal preparation. The cutting board beneath is light wood, with a shallow groove around the edge and a circular indentation at one end. The bread's surface is matte, with a natural, unprocessed appearance and no visible branding or packaging.
description: A rustic, partially sliced multigrain bread loaf with a thick, seeded crust sits on a wooden cutting board. The bread has a golden-brown, rough exterior and a dense, airy interior.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded, seeded end of the loaf and the full width of the cutting board.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the uneven, rustic crust and the partially sliced section of the loaf.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the open, sliced face of the bread, exposing the crumb and grain structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the domed top and the irregular, hand-shaped form of the loaf.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is thick, uneven, and rustic, with a scattering of sesame seeds and a rough, hand-shaped texture. There are no visible flour dustings or decorative scoring, giving it a natural, artisanal appearance.
